todos.content: Fix gas: ensure createClient with useGasFeeEstimations:false runs on first render, not just when viemChains changes
Fix batch tx: pass chainId to sendTx calls so wagmi uses correct chain
Fix revoke stale state: optimistically remove revoked approvals from state immediately after tx confirmation
Add refresh button to revoke tab header
